text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a Moderator. Please review the moderation guidelines in #mod-handbook and introduce yourself in #introductions. We're glad to have you on the team!
Welcome, guide_sam! You've joined as an Event Helper. Check out #events-team for upcoming activities and feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions. Excited to have you helping out!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a Member. Take a look around, say hi in #introductions, and don't hesitate to ask questions in #help. Happy to have you here!

Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor. Head over to #mentors-lounge to connect with the mentorship team, and feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions. We're thrilled to have your expertise in the community!
